query:
SELECT 
  id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayTeamName, homeTeamName,
  awayTeamNickname, homeTeamNickname,
  startTime, status,
  awaySpread, homeSpread, awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds,
  total, overOdds, underOdds,
  awayML, homeML,
  modelTotal, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread,
  modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore,
  publishedToFeed, publishedModel, modeled,
  awayKenPomRank, homeKenPomRank,
  awayAdjOE, homeAdjOE, awayAdjDE, homeAdjDE,
  awayTempo, homeTempo
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-28' AND sport = 'NCAAM'
ORDER BY startTime ASC;
